title: Ashen 16x PBR addon
description: Normal and specular maps for Ashen 16x resource pack. Adds shader support for textures using LabPBR format.
body:
This addon contains only normal and specular maps for the resource pack Ashen 16x developed by [Aim_Boot](https://modrinth.com/user/Aim_Boot) which can be downloaded here:

[**Ashen 16x**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen)

Requires Optifine or Iris shaders mod and must be in the list of resource packs higher than the original resource pack.

**Please note** that it's fan work. Do not report issues encountered with it to the author of the original resource pack for support.
